title: Fix: Host header injection vulnerability
original_text: Fixed Host header injection vulnerability. Implemented Host header validation. Added whitelist for allowed hosts. Implemented canonical URL generation. Added Host header sanitization. Result: Host header injection vulnerability fixed.
expected_subject: fix(security): fix Host header injection vulnerability
expected_body_lines: - Validation: Host header injection vulnerability fixed
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): fix Host header injection vulnerability"
